About the villa

Built with love,
made for everyone

Villa Almyra was built by our family with care and love — a Greek father from Arachova and a mother who is half Argentinian, half Italian. The result is a home that feels warm, personal, and unmistakably its own.

Perched on a quiet hillside just outside Vivlos, surrounded by nature, with sweeping views of the Aegean, the mountains, and Naxos Chora — this is a place for couples, families, and groups alike. Silence, space, and beauty in equal measure.

Amenities

Everything you need,
and then some

🏊
Infinity pool

~15 metres, right at the edge of the villa facing Plaka beach. Lit up at night for evening swims under the stars.

🌊
Panoramic sea view

Aegean sea, Naxos mountains, and the distant lights of Chora — visible from every corner of the villa.

🍽
Outdoor dining & BBQ

Two large outdoor dining areas, built-in BBQ, and a fully equipped outdoor kitchen for long evenings under the open sky.

❄️
AC · WiFi · Smart TV

Air conditioning in all rooms, high-speed WiFi throughout, and a Smart TV for streaming — everything you need to stay comfortable.

🌿
Garden & sunbeds

Sunbeds, umbrellas, outdoor shower, and a large private garage. Fitness equipment (pull-up bar & TRX) also available.

✦
Concierge extras

Private chef, yacht rental, airport transfer, groceries, personal trainer, VIP barber, babysitter — all on request.

Rates

Available on request

Villa Almyra is offered at a personalised rate depending on your dates and group size. Reach out and we'll send you a tailored quote within a few hours.

Available extras

Everything below is available on request and charged separately. Let us know when you enquire and we'll arrange it all before you arrive.

— Extra cleaning — Airport transfer — Grocery delivery — Private chef — Yacht rental — Personal trainer — VIP barber — Babysitter

Bookings via Airbnb or Booking.com require no deposit. Direct bookings via WhatsApp or other channels require a 50% deposit to confirm.

Ask for rates on WhatsApp →
Location

Vivlos, Naxos —
facing Plaka beach

Villa Almyra sits on a quiet hillside just outside the village of Vivlos, one of Naxos's most peaceful and unspoilt corners. Surrounded entirely by nature and neighbouring villas, the setting is genuinely tranquil — open sky, green landscape, and no tourist noise. The villa faces directly towards Plaka beach, one of the longest and most beautiful beaches on the island, with the Aegean sea, the mountains, and the distant glow of Naxos Chora all visible from the terrace.

  • ↓Facing Plaka beach directly
  • ~5'Village of Vivlos
  • ~10'Plaka beach by car
  • ~15'Naxos Town (Chora)
  • ~10'Naxos Airport (JNX)

Book your stay

Ready to arrive?

Villa Almyra is a family home — reach out directly on WhatsApp and you'll be speaking with us personally. We're happy to answer any questions, share more photos, or help you plan your stay around the island.

You can also find us on Airbnb and Booking.com if you prefer to book through a platform.

Book on Airbnb → Book on Booking.com → Book on VRBO →
